query_normalized: evolutionary pressure on alternative splicing in primates biology
rationale: The paper is a general review of information theory applications in evolutionary biology (proteins and simulated agents) and does not measure alternative splicing, primate-specific evolutionary pressures, or the specific biological mechanism requested.
